title: Air India Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Air India Cargo is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Air India Cargo family as a Warehouse Manager in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Air India Cargo:
Air India Cargo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India Cargo!
